SUMMARY

January 2020 - Present (6 years)
- Architected cloud security controls across AWS and Azure
- Led security reviews for 50+ cloud applications
- Built automated compliance scanning pipelines
- Managed team of 5 security engineers

March 2016 - December 2019 (4 years)
- Implemented IAM policies and access controls for AWS workloads
- Conducted security assessments and penetration testing
- Deployed SIEM solutions and incident response procedures

June 2013 - February 2016 (3 years)
- Monitored security events and alerts
- Performed vulnerability assessments
- Assisted with compliance audits (SOC 2, PCI DSS)
